_comment: Single source of truth for agent roster, routing edges, and tool grants. DO NOT edit the agent list manually — it must match .claude/agents/*.md frontmatter. Consumers: session-start.sh (banner), pretool-check.sh (force-delegate valid-agent list), VERSION.json (frameworkAgents), /protocol (routing).

cco.description: Strategic creative direction, brand strategy, campaign concepts, creative vision

cpa.description: Financial analysis, tax strategy, owner compensation, cash flow forecasting

cs.description: Sales strategy, discovery call prep, objection handling, prospect qualification

cw.description: UX copy, microcopy, error messages, button labels, help text

do.description: CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, infrastructure as code, monitoring

doc.description: Technical documentation, API docs, guides, and README creation

ind.description: Industrial design lens, product essentialism, reduction toward essence

me.description: Feature implementation, bug fixes, and refactoring

qa.description: Test strategy, test coverage, and bug verification

sd.description: Service design, customer journey mapping, touchpoint analysis

sec.description: Security review, vulnerability analysis, threat modeling using STRIDE+DREAD

ta.description: System architecture design and PRD-to-task planning

uid.description: UI component implementation, CSS/Tailwind, responsive layouts, accessibility

uids.description: Visual design, design tokens, color systems, typography, design system consistency

uxd.description: Interaction design, wireframing, task flows, information architecture

routingEdges.when: Security review, threat modeling, vulnerability analysis needed
Element verdict ready, interaction must be designed within it
Task flows ready for visual design
Design tokens and specs ready for component implementation
Components complete, ready for task planning
Creative direction or brand strategy needed
Tax implications or financial modeling needed
